subject: Update documentation to reflect new tool scope
body:
docs/README.md:
- Rename to "Software Transaction Structuring Tool"
- Update perspectives: Developer/Buyer/Combined → Your Company/Client/Net Effect
- Update model status (all implemented)
- Remove "inter-company" framing

docs/BUSINESS_GUIDE.md:
- Update title and target audience
- Reframe purpose: software company + any client
- Add scope clarification (works for ANY client, consolidated accounting not in scope)
- Update key sections: capabilities, who should use it, two modes
- Update model descriptions with Your Company/Client terminology
title: Update documentation to reflect new tool scope
